summary: EXP-422 closes ISS-2074 (WIN-070.c1 moderate hole: orbital-mechanics framing leaves temporal-correlation rescue open in main text). Single sentence-scope append to detail_evidence point (3) implementing c1 recommendation option (a): names the temporal-correlation rescue and closes it on two grounds — (a) "phase-locked" is the dome's own term and denotes spatial-temporal coupling, contradicting the strictly-temporal rescue; (b) even the temporal-only reading requires GRACE L1A timing reconciliation per JPL D-22027, which the chart neither addresses nor cites. No new outbound domains (both JPL URLs cited are already in WIN-070). Char delta: +978. BEFORE string verified unique. TLDRs, detail_verdict_text, finding, code_analysis unchanged. Ready-for-integration.
